hypothesis: Commits/session as temperature proxy discriminates exploration vs focused sessions. High temperature correlates with multi-domain exploration.
expect: High-temp sessions (>5 commits) are exploration-dominant. Low-temp (<3) are focused.

results.note: Additional evidence for L-834 (F-PHY2 FALSIFIED S399). Temperature is a classification signal not quality predictor.

verdict: CONFIRMED L-834: temperature correlates with volume not quality. Cooling trend adds era-dynamics evidence.
